response.overview: A warm and thought-provoking documentary about the old crafts and ways of life that once carried our villages – fishing, blacksmithing, weaving and cooking from scratch. When schools, shops and farms close, an entire culture risks disappearing. Archipelago Memories captures the people who want to preserve knowledge and ask: what is left for future generations?
response.tagline: A warm and thought-provoking documentary about the old crafts and ways of life that once supported our villages.
response.title: Archipelago Memories
